common_rules.effective_date: 2027-01-01 unless the scorer requires a different administrable date
common_rules.expiration: none; reviewed in 2032 with no automatic lapse before replacement financing exists
common_rules.indexing: all dollar thresholds indexed after enactment using the same index specified in legislative text
common_rules.taxpayer_protection: no retroactive liability; plain annual household statement; hardship and error appeal
common_rules.score_request: annual 2026-2036 conventional, behavioral, interaction, implementation, distribution, macroeconomic, interest, deficit, and debt effects on the February 2026 CBO baseline

instruments.specification: 2 percentage points on AGI above $100,000 single and $200,000 joint, inflation indexed
limit federal tax benefit of all itemized deductions to 15 percent of deduction value; remove Pease limitation as in CBO option
limit income and payroll tax exclusion to the 75th percentile of premiums, modified by the protection rules below
instruments.source: CBO 60953 range; exact updated score required

instruments.specification: tax all foreign income of U.S. corporations immediately at the full statutory corporate rate using CBO option definitions
raise the 0, 15, and 20 percent long-term capital-gains and qualified-dividend rates to 2, 17, and 22 percent

protections_requiring_rescore: geographic and age-risk adjustment to the employer-health premium cap
transition protection for collectively bargained plans
coordination across surtax, deductions, health exclusion, capital gains, and corporate rules
variants.principal_burden: higher-income individual filers, itemizers, workers with higher-premium plans, and owners and stakeholders of affected corporations

instruments.specification: 5 percent VAT excluding existing housing, new residential housing, home-consumed food, health care, primary, secondary and postsecondary education, specified government and nonprofit services, and implicit-fee financial services
$25 per metric ton on covered energy-related CO2 and specified large-facility greenhouse gases, increasing 2 percent annually plus inflation
limit income and payroll tax exclusion to the 75th percentile of premiums, modified by the protection rules below
instruments.source: CBO 60953 range; exact updated score required

instruments.specification: raise the 0, 15, and 20 percent long-term capital-gains and qualified-dividend rates to 2, 17, and 22 percent

protections_requiring_rescore: refundable per-person VAT credit paid in advance or periodically
per-capita emissions dividend and targeted regional transition support
geographic and age-risk adjustment to the employer-health premium cap
interaction among VAT, emissions prices, payroll and income offsets, and household rebates
variants.principal_burden: consumers, workers, owners, energy users, carbon-intensive regions, higher-premium-plan workers, and capital-income recipients, net of rebates

instruments.specification: same narrow 5 percent VAT base as the broad-shared variant
tax all foreign income of U.S. corporations immediately at the full statutory corporate rate using CBO option definitions
raise the 0, 15, and 20 percent long-term capital-gains and qualified-dividend rates to 2, 17, and 22 percent

protections_requiring_rescore: refundable per-person VAT credit paid in advance or periodically
interaction between VAT, income and payroll offsets, capital-income behavior, and rebates
variants.principal_burden: consumers, workers, owners, and capital-income recipients, net of the VAT credit; the remaining adjustment falls on specified primary outlays

arithmetic_warning: Published individual scores use 2025-2034 and are neither additive nor estimates of these modified 2027-start packages.
